title: fraxinus lanuginosa
intro: Fraxinus lanuginosa, also known as the velvet ash or hairy ash, is a deciduous tree species native to parts of North America. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. Fraxinus lanuginosa is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the velvet ash tree can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
